calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Judgment Under Terms Of Stipulated Settlement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support; And Request For Judcial Notice
Off Calendar Oct-21-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S Motion To Enter Judgment Under Terms Of Stipulated Settlement.

Bank of America's Motion to Enter Judgmnet Under Terms of Stipulated Settlement is GRANTED.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Samuel K. Feng; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/SKF)
